title: hahaland Baby Toys 6-12 Months - Farm Animals with Barn, Rattle, Crinkle Paper, Mirror - Busy Montessori Sensory Toys for Babies Toddlers 1-3 - Baby Easter Basket Stuffers
features: MY FIRST FARM ANIMAL SET: This delightful set includes a charming farm house & 6 animals. Crafted with love and care, these plush toys are more than just cute companions, they are a gateway to a world of sensory exploration and developmental play

SENSORY WONDERLAND: Say goodbye to fussy playtimes & hello to captivating engagement! They offer a hands-on experience, allowing your little ones explore farm animals' diverse textures, enhanced by delightful rattles inside some animals for surprises and joyful engagement. Satisfying crinkle sounds accompany gentle squeezes, offering a sensory experience beyond the ordinary. The barn's side mirror becomes a portal for self-discovery, fostering self-awareness and igniting moments of joy

FILL, DUMP & REPEAT FUN: Turn playtime into a developmental adventure! They go beyond ordinary play with two specially designed opening in the barn, creating an interactive experience for toddlers. The unique openings allow your little one to fill the barn with animals and joyfully dump them out again, providing endless entertainment and practice important motor skills

PERFECT FOR ON-THE-GO PLAY: All animals come neatly packaged in a big barn with a convenient handle. The compact design makes it easy for little hands to carry. Get baby & toddler happy and save parent’s worry for car trip, make the journey more enjoyable

SAFE TO EXPLORE WITH ALL SENSES: We understand the importance of safety when it comes to your babies. That's why our toy has been lab tested for safety in accordance with regulatory standards. It is made from baby-friendly materials and does not contain small parts. Our promise to you is a safe and engaging toy that your baby will love
description: Product Description hahaland Farm Animal Plush Toys Set - 7 PCS This delightful ensemble includes a charming barn & 6 adorable animals – Rabbit, Cow, Horse, Sheep, Pig, and Chicken. Crafted with love and expertise, these plush toys are more than just cute companions; they are a gateway to a world of sensory exploration and developmental play.
